ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol (e.g., V4L2_SLICED_TELETEXT_B) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the symbol (e.g., 0x0001) */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated signal standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbols_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES signal_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference (e.g., ETS 300 706) */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated signal standard */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES signal_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payloads" (
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payload */,
  "payload_description" TEXT /* Description of the payload */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated signal standard */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the payload in bytes */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the payload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payloads_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES signal_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_numbers" (
  "line_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line number */,
  "line_number" TEXT /* Line number(s) where the data is embedded (e.g., PAL/SECAM line 7-22, 320-335) */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated signal standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line number */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the line number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_numbers_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES signal_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal standard (e.g., PAL, SECAM, NTSC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal standard */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the signal standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_data" (
  "signal_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal data entry */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol */,
  "line_number_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line number */,
  "payload_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payload */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated signal standard */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the signal data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_line_number_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_number_id") REFERENCES line_numbers ("line_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_payload_id FOREIGN KEY ("payload_id") REFERENCES payloads ("payload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES signal_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
